channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: gsd-build /get-shit-done | JavaScript | N/A
item.description: A light-weight and powerful meta-prompting, context engineering and spec-driven development system for Claude Code by TÂCHES.

item.title: hacksider /Deep-Live-Cam | Python | N/A
item.description: real time face swap and one-click video deepfake with only a single image

item.title: anthropics /claude-cookbooks | Jupyter Notebook | N/A
item.description: A collection of notebooks/recipes showcasing some fun and effective ways of using Claude.

item.title: snarktank /ralph | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Ralph is an autonomous AI agent loop that runs repeatedly until all PRD items are complete.

item.title: coleam00 /Archon | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The first open-source harness builder for AI coding. Make AI coding deterministic and repeatable.

item.title: multica-ai /multica | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.

item.title: microsoft /markitdown | Python | N/A
item.description: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

item.title: thedotmack /claude-mem | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: A Claude Code plugin that automatically captures everything Claude does during your coding sessions, compresses it with AI (using Claude's agent-sdk), and injects relevant context back into future sessions.

item.title: shiyu-coder /Kronos | Python | N/A
item.description: Kronos: A Foundation Model for the Language of Financial Markets

item.title: NousResearch /hermes-agent | Python | N/A
item.description: The agent that grows with you

item.title: forrestchang /andrej-karpathy-skills | N/A | N/A
item.description: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
